alkylation reagent: alkylated with 10 mM iodoacetamide for 45 min in the dark
alkylation concentration: alkylated with 10 mM iodoacetamide for 45 min in the dark
cleavage agent: Proteolysis was achieved using sequencing grade chymotrypsin (Promega Corporation P/N V1062)
fragmentation method: MS2 settings of 1.6 m/z isolation window, 30% Higher Energy Collision Dissociation
instrument: an Orbitrap Eclipse Tribrid mass spectrometer (Thermo Scientific) operated in positive electrospray mode
labeling: label-free quantitative analysis of amino acids incorporated at residue 2
reduction reagent: reduced at room temperature using 5 mM dithiothreitol for 1.5 h
reduction concentration: reduced at room temperature using 5 mM dithiothreitol for 1.5 h
